meaning: n.澳大利亚的中部偏僻地区
examples: This is Centralia, a ghost town situated in Columbia County, Pennsylvania, USA.
The hillbilly and the Mexico City princess married in 1962 and moved to a farm in Centralia, Wash.
She tried to sell a cable system in her home town of Centralia, Washington, but learned that without telling her, her husband had transferred the ownership to his four sons.
At the Satsop site, two giant cooling towers still stand unmolested, and a local community college, Centralia, occasionally uses one of these structures to host an energy conference.
